chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rulings Regarding Male Slaves and Female Bondwoman

text: 4558 - وَ رَوَى وَهْبُ بْنُ وَهْبٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنِ اِتَّخَذَ مِنَ اَلْإِمَاءِ أَكْثَرَ مِمَّا يَنْكِحُ أَوْ يُنْكِحُ فَالْإِثْمُ عَلَيْهِ إِنْ بَغَيْنَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4558 - Wahb ibn Wahb narrated from Jafar ibn Muhammad, from his father (as), who said:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said: "Whoever acquires more bondwomen than he can marry or give in marriage, then the sin is upon him if they commit immorality."
